idea-plugin.name: SQL Transpiler
idea-plugin.description:
Cross-dialect SQL transpilation inside DataGrip and IntelliJ IDEA Ultimate, powered by brikk-sql (a full Kotlin port of sqlglot). Mark any SQL with -- dialect: xyz and execute it against the current engine through transpilation, or transpile any SQL between MySQL, Doris, Trino, Presto, DuckDB, PostgreSQL, and ClickHouse.

  • Execute via transpilation: write a block in one dialect, run it on whatever engine the console is attached to — transpile, review the generated SQL and its diagnostics, execute; unchanged re-runs skip the review
  • Transpile To / From: preview as a before/after diff, then replace in place, insert after, copy, or send to an open console
  • Exact diagnostics: unsupported constructs flagged by the generator, plus functions the target engine does not register (checked against real engine function catalogs)
  • Brikk SQL scratches (.bsql): a lenient polyglot file type where mixed-dialect marker blocks live grumble-free, with gutter actions per block
  • Pipe syntax (|>): write pipe-syntax SQL and generate standard SQL out of it automatically
  • AST viewer tool window over the brikk-sql expression tree

An independent plugin by Sortdev SRL, built on the open-source brikk-sql transpiler.

action.description: Creates a .bsql scratch file - the polyglot playground for dialect-marker blocks
Transpiles the scope into the attached console's engine dialect, reviews the result (skipped when unchanged since last approval), and runs it
Transpiles the selection (or dialect-marker block, or whole file) to a picked target dialect, with preview and diagnostics
Picks the source dialect explicitly (overriding detection), then transpiles into the file's current dialect
